name: positioning-workshop
description: Evidence-first positioning workshop for founders, PMM, and GTM teams.
long_description: Run a structured positioning workshop inside Claude Desktop with reusable artifacts, reference templates, example outputs, and a validated public-company walkthrough.

tools.name: bootstrap_workshop
tools.description: Create a new workshop folder with the standard positioning templates and artifact files.

tools.name: list_workshops
tools.description: List existing workshop folders and summarize which ones already have saved artifacts.

tools.name: save_workshop_file
tools.description: Write or update a workshop file such as an evidence file, messaging pack, or JSON artifact.

prompts.name: run_positioning_workshop
prompts.description: Start or resume a full evidence-first positioning workshop.

prompts.name: adapt_positioning_variants
prompts.description: Adapt an approved positioning spine for segments, personas, channels, or stages.

workshops_directory.title: Workshop Directory
workshops_directory.description: Where Claude should store writable workshop folders and saved artifacts.
